column1: # Chitosan/Cu(100) 240817 — unit-sequence ground truth (GlcNAc/GlcN per lobe)
# This file is for EXTERNAL EVALUATION ONLY (grading post-hoc). It must never
# be read by the fitting or model-selection code. Same label-free rule as the
# benchmark manifest: the sequence is used to grade predictions, not to guide
#   sequence    ordered string of 0/1 along the chain (t_nm increasing, the
#               code's PCA convention: "increasing y, then x").
#               Length = N_selected (should match the fitted lobe count).
#               Leave empty if the sequence is not yet available.
#   quality     benchmark quality class (clean / clean_target / poor_quality)
#   target_N    expected lobe count for human validation (6 for primary)
# The sequence orientation follows the code's deterministic PCA axis
# (axis = [-ay, ax], oriented "increasing y, then x" — see core.jl:700-701).
# If your ground truth is encoded in a molecule-relative convention
# (e.g. reducing-end -> non-reducing-end), the grading script tests all 4
# alignments (identity, reverse, flip, reverse+flip) to find the best match.
# Fill in the `sequence` column for each file. Add or remove rows as needed
